---
title: "\'Books for Young People\'"
---

## \'Books for Young People\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1887
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Girls\' Friendly Society Associates\' Journal and Advertiser</i> (June 1887) 75

### Notes

The article is signed C.M. Yonge.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
